comments.author: corona10
comments.body: I will try to take a look at today :)

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: Wait I closed my PR in favour of yours... :laughing: @ZeroIntensity

comments.author: ZeroIntensity
comments.body: Ah! I'll reopen this and list you as a co-author if yours has merge conflicts.

comments.author: colesbury
comments.body:
* Let's avoid critical sections in bytecodes.c. It's too easy to make these kinds of mistakes where you exit out of a critical section without ending it.
* I don't think the generator running thread safety should use critical sections. We should use something like an atomic-compare-exchange to mark it as running

comments.author: github-actions[bot]
comments.body: This PR is stale because it has been open for 30 days with no activity.
